what_it_does: Declares one AI-tic catalogue entry: a module-level AI_TIC dict with id 'agent_arch', label 'agent-arch', a markers list of phrase cues, and a desc — capturing the generic-AI tell of defaulting to agent-architecture (tools+autonomy+loop) when the work is actually content/dataflow.
observations: Single module-level constant AI_TIC over the schema {id, label, markers, desc}.
markers list: 'the agent decides', 'autonomous agent', 'agent loop', 'tool-calling agent', 'the agent will then', 'agentic workflow'.
Docstring frames it as a named Tim distinction: agentic is supported but NEVER the default/assumption; cross-references runtime/ai_tics.py and ai_tics/AGENTS.md.
id 'agent_arch' equals the file stem, satisfying the registry's id==stem requirement.
standouts: Encodes a content/dataflow-vs-agent-architecture distinction (resolve->work->persist->trigger; models = slot-values) as a matchable fingerprint.
conventions: Follows the file-discovered registry pattern: add-a-row = add-a-FILE, one AI_TIC dict per file (mirrors roles/skills/projections/node-types).
Docstring cites the seam (runtime/ai_tics.py) and the folder constitution, consistent with the repo's self-describing style.
notes: A seed AI-tic file declaring the 'defaulting to agent-architecture' generic-AI tell as a markers-based catalogue entry for the fingerprint pass.
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the docstring says it declares the agent-arch AI-tic and the AI_TIC dict does exactly that.
intention_signals: Turn Tim's named distinction (not-agent-architecture-by-default) into a discoverable, matchable catalogue entry the fingerprint pass can subtract.
novelty: Captures the agent-architecture-by-default tell as a first-class data entry rather than a code branch.
contribution: Contributes the 'agent_arch' tic definition and its specific marker phrases to the AI-tic catalogue.
summary_for_embedding: A file-discovered AI-tic entry (AI_TIC dict) named agent_arch with marker phrases for the generic-AI tell of defaulting to agent-architecture over content/dataflow.
intention_for_embedding: To register Tim's not-agent-architecture-by-default distinction as a fingerprint-matchable catalogue entry.
